h677ac9fbg5cbag4034g8324g507ba0e1ccec: 'Scuse me, yer drowness. We need him alive. So, uh, please don't do that again, or we'll have to kill ya.
h59cfd284g8896g436bga4b7gcbef7d9d2abf: S-sorry yer drowness, but the True Soul ordered us to keep the prisoner alive, no matter what.
hf96a8e0age7c1g4840g9d86g57124dfa1852: Oi! Get yer hands off the prisoner! We need him alive.
h0de5bf43g4752g4a8bga297g17ab424a252d: I warned ya not to touch our prisoner. How 'bout I bleed you out, hmm?
h784e8bedgc6a2g45c3g9dc0g93f3a060a365: Tnak! Drow still wanted answers from the prisoner.
h3e3b61abga5a8g46eega0a5g1b8b273d3ae2: We're good as dead - But maybe your corpse will calm her down.
